title: Digital door knocking: prospecting that respects the decade
dek: The old-school agents knocked on doors. The volume is now on LinkedIn and Instagram, and almost nobody is knocking.
heroAlt: Digital door knocking: prospecting that respects the decade

blocks.html: Somebody in your city just posted about their new job. Someone else asked for neighborhood recommendations in a comment section. A third person announced they are moving in ninety days. Three warm prospects, in public, today, and the odds are no agent will contact any of them.

Digital door knocking is the discipline of finding those signals daily and opening conversations, one human message at a time. Not automation blasts, not copy-paste pitches. A genuine, useful note to a person who just told the internet they are about to need you.

blocks.text: The lead is lying in public. The agent who says something useful first usually wins.

items.title: Search the signals.
items.html: Your city plus moving, relocating, apartment hunting, new job. Ten minutes of searching surfaces the day's list.

items.title: Lead with help, not hunger.
items.html: Congrats on the new role. If you end up looking near the office, happy to send over which buildings are actually worth touring. Value first, zero pressure.

items.title: Track and follow up.
items.html: Every conversation into the CRM with a next touch. Digital knocks compound exactly like physical ones did.

blocks.html: Do one ten-minute signal search right now and send three helpful messages. Do it daily for two weeks before judging the channel. The results lag the effort by exactly that long.
Course 3 ships the full library: LinkedIn sequences, Instagram openers, and the follow-up tracks that turn replies into tours.

blocks.lead: Course 3 includes every DM script and sequence.
